title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero discusses how most companies plateau at 40% productivity gains with AI coding assistants and argues the bottleneck extends beyond code writing across the entire SDLC. Cursor has built agent systems for bug triage, security review, risk detection, growth experiments, and PM/EM tasks to break past this plateau.
